query: SELECT 'monitored_groups' as tbl, instanceId, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM monitored_groups WHERE userId=1 GROUP BY instanceId UNION ALL SELECT 'automations' as tbl, instanceId, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM automations WHERE userId=1 GROUP BY instanceId UNION ALL SELECT 'whatsapp_instances' as tbl, id, 1 FROM whatsapp_instances WHERE userId=1;
